Anime.js bundled library
Version: 3.2.2
Primary CDN source used for this package:
https://unpkg.com/animejs@3.2.2/lib/anime.min.js
Alternative CDN URL:
https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/animejs/3.2.2/anime.min.js

The site references this local copy from index.html:
<script src="vendor/anime.min.js"></script>
